name: LED SLIM FLOOD LIGHTS CCT SELECTABLE 20W – 240W
description: Our LED Flood Lights are engineered to deliver powerful, energy-efficient illumination across a variety of applications. With power options ranging from 20W ,30W, 50W,100W, 240W and a consistent color temperature of 5700K, these lights provide bright, daylight-quality output suitable for outdoor commercial, industrial, and security lighting needs. Designed with IP65-rated protection, they are built to perform in harsh weather conditions. Key Features: Consistent Daylight Output: 5700K color temperature across all wattages ensures bright, natural light. Energy-Efficient: Up to 125 lm/W efficacy helps reduce power consumption and operating costs. Weatherproof Design: IP65 rating for reliable outdoor performance in all conditions. Long Lifespan: Rated for 50,000 hours of operation, minimizing maintenance and replacements. Certified Quality: UL and DLC certified for safety, quality, and rebate eligibility. Peace of Mind: Comes with a 5-year manufacturer warranty. Applications: Ideal for parking lots, building facades, sports fields, loading docks, perimeter security, and general outdoor area lighting.
short_desc: Product Specifications: Wattage Options: 20W / 30W / 50W / 100W / 240W Color Temperature: 5700K Lumen Output: 20W: 2,400 lm 30W: 3,750 lm 50W: 6,250 lm 100W: 12,000 lm 240W: 30,000 lm Input Voltage: 100–277V AC IP Rating: IP65 (Waterproof & Dustproof) Lifespan: 50,000 hours Certifications: UL / DLC Warranty: 5 Years Housing: Aluminum Alloy + Steel+ PC Housing Color: Black
